final.notes: Inspected all 101 rendered pages using ordered page contact sheets, with full-page checks at the beginning and final page. Frames and dynamic page numbers repeat, content stays inside the frame, chapter transitions and answer lines are intact, equations and bilingual text are visible, and no clipping, overlap, blank-render failure, or visible font substitution was found.

preview.notes: Inspected every rendered preview page; decorative frame and page numbering repeat correctly, content remains within the frame, equations and Devanagari/Kruti Dev content render without visible substitution, and no clipping or overlap was found.
